description: Illustrative ecological claim token pattern with methodology, verifier, registry, and double-counting evidence.

authority.name: Example Methodology Owner
authority.delegationScope: Defines methodology variables, formulas, claim evidence, and verifier role for this example.

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Production use requires registry acceptance and independent methodology review.

rightsModel.legalClaim: Represents a verified ecological claim or pre-credit claim, not automatically a tradable credit.
rightsModel.economicRights: Economic rights depend on registry issuance and market rules.
rightsModel.redemptionRights: Retirement, cancellation, or conversion rights depend on registry process.
